title: rhododendron degronianum subsp. yakushimanum
intro: Rhododendron degronianum subsp. yakushimanum is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Ericaceae, known for its striking white flowers with a hint of pink and its compact growth habit. The plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in China, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rhododendron degronianum subsp. yakushimanum include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues due to its expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, including tea, tinctures, and infusions, which are typically used to treat colds, bronchitis, and other respiratory conditions.
